summary: MongoDB migration and lesson progress tracking with content versioning - all features tested and working. 19/19 backend tests passed, all frontend UI features verified.

issues: Console warning: Missing DialogDescription (aria-describedby) - minor accessibility warning, cosmetic only

lesson_progress_tracking: Mark lesson as in_progress when opened - PUT /api/lessons/{id}/progress
Lesson shows in_progress status in GET response
Progress indicator (checkmark/circle) displayed in lessons list
Mark lesson as completed with 'Урок пройден' button
Completed lesson shows 'Пройден' status and green checkmark
User stats updated with completed lessons count
content_versioning: Completed lesson returns saved content snapshot (is_snapshot=true)
'Сохранённая версия' indicator displayed for completed lessons
Warning banner 'Вы видите контент, сохранённый на момент прохождения урока' shown
No snapshot warning for incomplete lessons
Different users get different snapshot states for same lesson
frontend_ui: Login page loads and accepts credentials
Dashboard displays with all tabs (Tasks, Learning, Documents)
Modules displayed with correct lesson counts
'Урок пройден' button visible for incomplete lessons
'Урок пройден' button hidden for completed lessons
Tasks loaded and displayed from MongoDB
Documents loaded and displayed from MongoDB

critical_code_review_comments: Content versioning correctly saves snapshot on lesson completion
API correctly returns is_snapshot flag based on user's completion status
Progress tracking properly tracks per-user progress via user_id parameter
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend testing for progress verification (test_user_*, completed_user_*, versioning_user_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full MongoDB migration complete. Collections: teachers, tasks, documents, modules, lessons, lesson_progress, task_states. Lesson progress API: GET /api/lessons/{id}?user_id=X returns is_snapshot=true and saved content for completed lessons. PUT /api/lessons/{id}/progress with {status: 'completed'} saves content snapshot. Frontend shows 'Сохранённая версия' indicator and warning banner for snapshots.
